content: The Central Bureau of Investigation, under Section 173 CrPC, files this charge sheet against: 1. Arjun Mehta (MD, VedaCorp) 2. Priya Mehta (Wife of Arjun Mehta, Director, Sahara Ventures) 3. Rajiv Desai (CFO, VedaCorp) 4. Dr. Anjali Kulkarni (Auditor, Board Member) for offenses under Sections 420 (Cheating), 467 (Forgery of valuable security), 468 (Forgery for purpose of cheating), 471 (Using forged document as genuine), 409 (Criminal breach of trust by public servant), 120B (Criminal conspiracy), and Sections 3 and 4 of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002. The accused conspired to fabricate ₹12.7 crore in revenue using shell companies registered using stolen identities. Board minutes were forged using digitally cloned signatures. Auditor was bribed. ₹18 crore was laundered via Sahara Ventures to offshore trusts. Whistleblower was framed. Evidence includes digital forensics, bank trails, CCTV, and witness testimonies. All accused are remanded in custody pending trial.
